name: Tyler Data & Insights (Socrata) Open Data API
what_it_does: Socrata (Tyler Data & Insights) REST API for government open data portal and civic analytics platform. Enables AI agents to manage government dataset discovery and metadata retrieval across federal, state, and local data portals, handle Socrata Open Data API (SODA) queries for structured government data access, access time-series government data for trend analysis and civic analytics, retrieve geographic and GIS-linked government dataset queries with spatial filtering, manage data visualization and dashboard configuration for public-facing analytics, handle government dataset publishing and update workflow automation, access performance management and government KPI tracking data, retrieve budget and financial transparency data for government accountability, manage community dataset and citizen data submission workflows, and integrate open government data with analytics, BI, and civic technology platforms.
use_cases: Querying government open datasets from civic analytics agents
Accessing financial transparency data from government accountability agents
Retrieving geographic government data from GIS integration agents
Publishing government KPI data from performance management agents
not_for: Proprietary government data without open data and transparency context
Private sector data without government open data portal integration
CJIS or other restricted government data without explicit authorization
best_when: A civic tech developer, government agency, or researcher using Socrata wants AI agents to automate open data queries, government analytics, performance reporting, and civic data pipeline integration.
avoid_when: DATA QUALITY LIMITATION: Government open datasets have variable data quality and update frequency — always check dataset metadata for last updated date and data owner contact. Some datasets have missing values or inconsistent schemas across jurisdictions. Privacy-restricted fields may be redacted; automated analysis should handle null values gracefully.

auth.notes: Socrata SODA API uses app token for throttle bypass (not required for basic access). Per-developer app tokens at dev.socrata.com. Unauthenticated read access for public datasets with throttling. API keys for higher rate limits. SDKs in Python, Ruby, JavaScript, R. SODA 2.0 query syntax for dataset filtering and aggregation. Acquired by Tyler Technologies (2018, $152M).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free public dataset access without app token (throttled); free app token for higher limits
pricing.paid_tiers: Government data portal subscription for publishing; data analysis platform for agencies
pricing.notes: Seattle, Washington. Founded 2007. Acquired by Tyler Technologies (2018, $152M). Now Tyler Data & Insights. Government open data platform market. 2,000+ government data portals. Data.gov powered by Socrata. Chicago Open Data Portal, NYC Open Data, California Open Data. Known for SODA API standard. Socrata brand maintained for developer community. Competes with OpenDataSoft for government open data.

performance.rate_limits: Throttled without app token; 1000+ req/hr with app token; documented at dev.socrata.com

known_agent_gotchas: DATA QUALITY: Government datasets have variable quality; always check `updatedAt` metadata and data owner before building automated pipelines on open data
App token required for automation — unauthenticated access is throttled to ~1000 req/day; register app token for higher limits in production automation
SODA query syntax — Socrata uses SODA 2.0 query syntax (SoQL) which resembles SQL; learn SoQL for efficient filtering, aggregation, and pagination
Dataset schema variability — dataset schemas vary per publishing agency and may change; implement schema validation before automated pipeline ingestion
Pagination required — default page size is limited; implement $offset and $limit pagination for complete dataset retrieval
Portal-specific endpoints — each government's data portal has own domain (data.cityofnewyork.us, data.ca.gov); queries must target the specific portal hosting the dataset
agent_readiness.security_notes: Government open data. SOC2. App token (optional). US. Government public datasets and civic data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Open government data. SOC2. App token. US. Public government datasets.
